reviews.review_description: I got the game and it looked really fun. I understand the concept ￼and I’m pretty sure I saw videos of people playing the game on TikTok ￼but when I go to play the court moves wherever I look and it’s really annoying cause I can’t fix it. And also when I pull up the￼ menu￼￼ it glitches out and pops up with multiple menus. Every time you try to exit what I’m trying to say is it’s a great game but it’s not working for me and hopefully if anyone else gets it it works for them. ￼
